message:
fix(ratelimit): Fix race condition and integer overflow in token bucket

- Use compare_exchange in refill() to atomically update tokens, avoiding
  race with try_acquire() that could cause token decrements to be lost
- Use try_into().unwrap_or(u32::MAX) to safely handle large elapsed times
  instead of potentially overflowing as u32 cast
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] to mock_server requests field (future use)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
